query:
SELECT 
  id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate,
  -- Book RL fields (written by VSiN scraper)
  awayRunLine, homeRunLine,
  awayRunLineOdds, homeRunLineOdds,
  -- Model RL fields (written by mlbModelRunner)
  awayModelSpread, homeModelSpread,
  awayModelSpreadOdds, homeModelSpreadOdds,
  -- Book spread fields (dual-write from VSiN scraper for MLB)
  awayBookSpread, homeBookSpread,
  awaySpreadOdds, homeSpreadOdds,
  -- Edge fields
  spreadDiff, spreadEdge
FROM games
WHERE (awayTeam = 'ATL' AND homeTeam = 'LAD' AND gameDate = '2026-05-10')
   OR (awayTeam = 'CHC' AND homeTeam = 'TEX' AND gameDate = '2026-05-10')
ORDER BY awayTeam;
